# minimum

**Instance Property**

The lowest possible number for the value.

## Declaration

```swift
var minimum: Double { get }
```

## Discussion

The framework sets the value of this property to the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASENumberMetaParameterDefinition/init(value:minimum:maximum:)] argument.

## Reistricting the Value

- **maximum**: The highest possible number for the value.
